articles.title: Taking stock of Bruins’ top trade chips entering the NHL deadline
articles.description:
The Bruins could parlay draft picks, prospects, and NHL talent into other assets before Friday's trade deadline.

The post Taking stock of Bruins’ top trade chips entering the NHL deadline appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Bruins prepare for NHL trade deadline on March 3, 2026.

Potential trades could enhance Bruins' playoff chances for Boston fans.

articles.title: As Mideast conflict widens, US says attacks on Iran will last weeks and intensify
articles.description:
The intensity of the attacks, the killing of Iranian Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei and the lack of any apparent exit plan set the stage for a prolonged conflict with far-reaching consequences.

The post As Mideast conflict widens, US says attacks on Iran will last weeks and intensify appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: US attacks on Iran expected to intensify over the coming weeks.
Iranian Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei killed, escalating regional tensions.
Local Boston residents may face increased security measures and economic impacts.

articles.title: Quincy man sentenced in fatal St. Patrick’s Day assault in downtown Boston
articles.description:
“Some bad decisions nearly three years ago resulted in one person losing his life, another person losing his freedom and many friends and family members left with eternal loss and sadness,” the Suffolk Count District Attorney said.

The post Quincy man sentenced in fatal St. Patrick’s Day assault in downtown Boston appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Quincy man sentenced to 10 years for fatal St. Patrick's Day assault in Boston.
Incident occurred nearly three years ago, resulting in one death and significant community grief.
Suffolk County DA highlights lasting impact on victims' families and friends.

articles.title: US gold medal-winning captain Hilary Knight reveals she played at the Olympics with a torn MCL
articles.description:
“I’m not walking around the best, and I’m missing a few games for the (PWHL’s) Seattle Torrent,” Knight said on “CBS Mornings.”

The post US gold medal-winning captain Hilary Knight reveals she played at the Olympics with a torn MCL appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Hilary Knight revealed she played at the Olympics with a torn MCL.
Knight is currently missing games for the PWHL's Seattle Torrent.
Her injury highlights the physical demands faced by local athletes.
